name: Avery
feeding_mode: Bottle-fed expressed breast milk (occasional formula top-up if needed)
care_instructions: Use saline + gentle nasal suction for congestion as needed, especially before feeds and sleep
Acetaminophen permitted for fever if rectal temperature ≥ 38.0 C per pediatric guidance; do not exceed labeled frequency; confirm dosing with pediatrician
Monitor hydration: wet diaper pattern and intake vs baseline
notes: Generally healthy; mild colds a couple of times since birth
Tends to take smaller feeds when congested
